overview: Acilia-Castel Fusano-Ostia Antica is a vibrant suburban area located in the Municipality of Rome, Italy. It serves as a gateway to the beautiful coastline of the Tyrrhenian Sea while being close to the historic ruins of Ostia Antica, an ancient Roman port city. With a population of 129,362, this area blends modern living with rich history, making it a vital part of the greater Rome metropolitan area and an attractive destination for both residents and tourists.
history: Acilia-Castel Fusano-Ostia Antica has roots dating back to ancient Rome, with Ostia Antica serving as a crucial port. The area has evolved over centuries, reflecting the growth of Rome and its suburbs.
economy: The economy of Acilia-Castel Fusano-Ostia Antica is primarily driven by tourism, retail, and local services. The proximity to Rome and the coast attracts visitors, while local businesses cater to the needs of both residents and tourists, creating a diverse economic landscape.
tourism: Visitors to Acilia-Castel Fusano-Ostia Antica can explore the archaeological site of Ostia Antica, which showcases well-preserved ruins from ancient Rome. The area's beaches, parks, and waterfront promenades offer relaxation and recreational activities, making it a popular destination for families and history enthusiasts alike.

weather_summary: Mild winters and hot summers, with occasional rainfall, typical of the Mediterranean climate.

faqs.question: What time zone is Acilia-Castel Fusano-Ostia Antica in?
faqs.answer: Acilia-Castel Fusano-Ostia Antica is in the Europe/Rome time zone.

faqs.question: Does Acilia-Castel Fusano-Ostia Antica observe daylight saving time?
faqs.answer: Yes, Acilia-Castel Fusano-Ostia Antica observes daylight saving time, typically from the last Sunday in March to the last Sunday in October.

faqs.question: What is the population of Acilia-Castel Fusano-Ostia Antica?
faqs.answer: The population of Acilia-Castel Fusano-Ostia Antica is approximately 129,362.

faqs.question: When does sunrise typically occur in Acilia-Castel Fusano-Ostia Antica?
faqs.answer: Sunrise in Acilia-Castel Fusano-Ostia Antica typically occurs between 6:30 AM and 7:00 AM, depending on the season.

faqs.question: What is the best time to visit Acilia-Castel Fusano-Ostia Antica?
faqs.answer: The best time to visit Acilia-Castel Fusano-Ostia Antica is during spring (April to June) and early autumn (September to October) for pleasant weather.
